creator: renchap@cocoa-x.com
text:
Does not seems to fix the issue, you get an error at runtime :
/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.1/amd64-freebsd9/bdb.so: Undefined symbol "RCLASS_M_TBL"

I get this error when trying to start irc/rbot on 9.2 with ruby 2.1. I dont know if the port is up to date, I run from trunk : https://github.com/jsn/rbot

Works fine with ruby 2.0.
